flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Immokalee Technical College rose 41% between 2010 and 2011 ($10.3k → $14.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Immokalee Technical College fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (91.2% → 73.3%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Immokalee Technical College rose 14% between 2010 and 2011 ($2.7k → $3.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Immokalee Technical College rose 72% between 2021 and 2024 (186 → 319).
